name: property-value-appraisal-only
rationale: Broker intake does not state property_value in email body. Appraisal doc shows $815,000. No correction. F1.PV canonical-map falls back to docs-tier (appraisal) when broker tiers are empty. Tests appraisal-doc winning when broker source is absent for property_value.
notes: Single-event sequence. Mirror of A02 (broker_initial_intent for LA) but for PV with broker_silent — appraisal is the canonical doc source for PV.
